site: Gold Coast Desalination Plant offshore multiport diffuser (Tugun, QLD) — Case 3-1, 100% plant capacity; MEASURED boundary dilution 48.4:1 at the 60 m mixing-zone limit
reference: Baum, M.J. (2019), 'Dense Jet Behaviour in Dynamic Receiving Environments', PhD thesis, Univ. of Queensland, Tables 2.2-2.3; peer-reviewed as Baum, Gibbes, Grinham, Albert, Fisher & Gale (2018), J. Hydraul. Eng. 144(11), doi:10.1061/(ASCE)HY.1943-7900.0001524
method: fit near-field return-dilution coefficient (Roberts S_r=1.6Fr) to MEASURED dilution at the mixing-zone station
